name: WASTE ENERGY CORP.
business: Waste Energy Corp. is an early-stage waste-to-energy company that uses a specialized thermal conversion process to convert plastic and tire waste into synthetic diesel fuel, carbon black, and syngas. The company also develops a patent-pending AI-based emissions monitoring and carbon credit automation technology. Revenue is expected from sales of clean diesel fuel and carbon black, environmental credit monetization, consulting services, and licensing or equipment sales.

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the development and implementation of technologies designed to divert plastic and tire waste from landfills and convert these materials into usable energy sources.

Additionally, we are developing a patent-pending AI-based emissions monitoring, management, and automated carbon credit creation technology, which we anticipate licensing to industrial partners, waste management firms, and regulatory agencies.

catalysts.event: Pilot project launch with 30 TPD capacity
catalysts.sentence: We are currently focused on launching our pilot project with an output of up to 30-tons-per-day (TPD) of waste conversion.
